title: Allotment
description: A delightful gardening mod for Minecraft Java Edition
body:
> ℹ️ This description is still work-in progress!

> ⚠️ **THIS MOD IS STILL IN EARLY DEVELOPMENT AND WILL NOT WORK PROPERLY IN SURVIVAL YET!**

---

Allotment is a decorative gardening mod for Minecraft Java Edition. Currently only available for 1.16.5, support for other newer versions is in the works!
